values.title: Diverse Styles
values.description: Ballet, contemporary, hip hop, jazz, salsa, and more under one roof.

values.title: World-Class Instructors
values.description: Teachers with Broadway, international competition, and conservatory backgrounds.

values.title: Performance Opportunities
values.description: Annual showcases, community events, and competition teams for all ages.

values.title: All Ages Welcome
values.description: Programs for children, teens, adults, and seniors at every skill level.

values.title: Professional Studios
values.description: Sprung floors, mirrors, professional sound, and climate-controlled rooms.

values.title: Community Spirit
values.description: A warm, supportive environment where dancers inspire each other.

values.title: Rhythm & Motion Dance
values.hero_description: Where passion meets technique. Professional dance instruction for all ages, all styles, all levels.
values.cta_description: Your first class is on us. Discover the joy of dance in a welcoming, inspiring studio.

values.title: Classical Ballet
values.body: Foundational ballet training emphasizing technique, posture, and artistry. From barre work to center combinations, develop the grace and discipline that underlies all dance forms.

values.title: Hip Hop Groove
values.body: High-energy hip hop choreography set to the latest beats. Learn popping, locking, breaking fundamentals, and freestyle expression in an electric atmosphere.

values.title: Contemporary Fusion
values.body: Blending modern, jazz, and improvisational techniques. Explore emotional expression through movement, floor work, and partnering.

values.title: Salsa & Bachata
values.body: Learn the hottest Latin dance styles with a focus on rhythm, partner connection, and social dancing. No partner needed to join.

values.title: Nina Alvarez
values.body: Former principal dancer with the National Ballet Company. Nina brings 20 years of professional performance and teaching experience, nurturing technique and artistry in every student.

values.title: DJ Williams
values.body: Award-winning hip hop choreographer who has worked with top music artists and appeared on national television. His classes are high-energy, creative, and push boundaries.

values.title: Carmen Ruiz
values.body: International salsa champion and social dance ambassador. Carmen makes Latin dance accessible and joyful, whether you have two left feet or ten years of experience.

values.title: Spring Showcase 2026
values.body:
Our annual spring showcase featuring performances from every class and age group. A celebration of a season's worth of hard work, creativity, and growth.

Program

  • Youth Ballet Ensemble
  • Teen Hip Hop Crew
  • Adult Contemporary Company
  • Latin Dance Spectacular

values.title: The Urban Nutcracker
values.body: A modern reimagining of the holiday classic blending classical ballet with hip hop, jazz, and contemporary styles. A holiday tradition for the whole family.

values.title: Summer Dance Gala
values.body: An elegant evening of dance featuring our advanced company performing original choreography by guest artists from around the world.

values.title: About Rhythm & Motion Dance
values.body:
Rhythm & Motion Dance has been a cornerstone of our community's arts scene since 2010. What began as a small ballet studio has grown into a vibrant multi-discipline dance center.

Our Mission

To ignite the love of dance in people of all ages and backgrounds, fostering creativity, confidence, and community through movement.

Our Studios

Three state-of-the-art studios with sprung floors, professional sound systems, and full-length mirrors provide the perfect environment for learning and performing.

values.title: FAQ
values.body:
Do I need dance experience?

Not at all! We have beginner classes in every style. Our instructors will make you feel comfortable from day one.

What should I wear?

Comfortable clothing you can move in. Ballet requires specific attire — ask us for details.

How old does my child need to be?

We accept students from age 3 for creative movement, and structured classes begin at age 5.

Can I watch a class before enrolling?

Absolutely! Contact us to schedule an observation visit.
